mission.title: kube-ovn: feat(helm): new chart design
mission.description:
This PR is about issue [#4330](https://github.com/kubeovn/kube-ovn/issues/4330) 

This is a draft, it shouldn't change any resource name as to not break existing installations, but if someone wants to update using the Helm Chart, they'll obviously have to adapt their values.

Fixes #4330

resolution.summary: Note that I have no clue what the difference is between DPDK and DPDK-hybrid, the DPDK docs only mention the hybrid version as far as I know
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
